Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz outranges your soldiers significantly. Respect his poke and only trade when soldiers are positioned well.
Vel'Koz.ability_to_dodge: Vel'Koz E (Tractor Beam) — dodge sideways or back immediately. This is his only CC.
Vel'Koz.early_game: Play safe and let him push. His range advantage is overwhelming early.
Vel'Koz.mid_game: Look for flanking ult opportunities. Vel'Koz has low mobility if caught off-guard.
Vel'Koz.late_game: He outscales in poke damage. Win through flanks or teamfights where his range is negated.
Vel'Koz.win_condition: Get a roaming lead or flank with ult. Don't fight him directly in long-range exchanges.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Vel'Koz outscales — his sustained poke damage is overwhelming late game
Vel'Koz.positioning: Use your soldiers as damage barriers. Don't overextend without soldiers in range.

Brand.trading_pattern: Brand has stronger early poke. Space carefully and only trade when he's low on mana.
Brand.ability_to_dodge: Brand Q (Sear) — dodge by stepping sideways or behind minions.
Brand.early_game: Play defensively. Brand wins early poke wars. Farm safely.
Brand.mid_game: Use soldiers to farm from distance. Look for flanking ult plays.
Brand.late_game: Brand scales better into teamfights. Avoid direct engagements unless you're flanking.
Brand.win_condition: Roam for side lane picks or flank teamfights with ult. Don't fight head-on.
Brand.scaling: Brand outscales — his sustained burn and teamfight damage is stronger
Brand.positioning: Keep distance and use soldiers for trading, not direct poke.

Xerath.trading_pattern: Xerath outranges you. Play around minion waves and poke when he's vulnerable.
Xerath.ability_to_dodge: Xerath Q (Runic Barrage) — dodge by moving perpendicular or behind minions.
Xerath.early_game: Respect his range and farm safely. His poke range is superior.
Xerath.mid_game: Look for flanking opportunities. Xerath lacks mobility when caught.
Xerath.late_game: His long-range poke dominates. Win through teamfights or flanks only.
Xerath.win_condition: Flank with ult or create teamfight opportunities where his range doesn't matter.
Xerath.scaling: Xerath outscales — his range advantage persists throughout the game
Xerath.positioning: Use minions for cover. Try to close distance gradually.

Annie.trading_pattern: Annie has early burst with Tibbers. Trade when her stun is down, retreat when it's up.
Annie.ability_to_dodge: Annie Q (Disintegrate) — dodge by moving. Her auto-attack range is shorter than yours.
Annie.early_game: Trade when her stun counter is low. Respect her all-in when she has 4+ stacks.
Annie.mid_game: Position away from walls where she can trap you. Use soldiers to poke safely.
Annie.late_game: Teamfights favor positioning. Keep distance and use ult to escape her Tibbers engage.
Annie.win_condition: Win through soldier positioning in teamfights. Avoid her stun engagement.
Annie.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Annie.positioning: Stay away from walls and keep distance when her stun is about to come up.

LeBlanc.trading_pattern: LeBlanc is all-in burst. Trade only with soldiers positioned defensively. Respect her all-in range.
LeBlanc.ability_to_dodge: LeBlanc E (Ethereal Chains) — dodge by moving away or to the side.
LeBlanc.early_game: Play defensively. LeBlanc has superior all-in damage.
LeBlanc.mid_game: Use soldiers to farm from safety. Look for ult escape plays.
LeBlanc.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfight position determines winner.
LeBlanc.win_condition: Use soldiers as defensive tools. Win through teamfights where you can position safely.
LeBlanc.scaling: Even — both scale similarly through the game
LeBlanc.positioning: Keep soldiers between you and LeBlanc. Back off when she walks forward.

Pantheon.trading_pattern: Pantheon dominates early. Farm safely and avoid short trades at all costs.
Pantheon.ability_to_dodge: Pantheon Q (Spear) — dodge by stepping behind minions or moving back.
Pantheon.early_game: Play extremely safely. Pantheon will destroy you in close trades.
Pantheon.mid_game: Farm with soldiers from distance. Look for roam and teamfight opportunities.
Pantheon.win_condition: Survive early and scale with teammates. Win through teamfight positioning.
Pantheon.scaling: Even — Pantheon strong early, scaling equalizes late
Pantheon.positioning: Stay at maximum distance with soldiers. Never walk forward.

Cho'Gath.trading_pattern: Cho'Gath is melee-focused. Trade at range with soldiers and retreat when he walks forward.
Cho'Gath.ability_to_dodge: Cho'Gath Q (Rupture) — dodge by moving perpendicular to his aim.
Cho'Gath.early_game: Trade at range. Respect his all-in potential and mana pool.
Cho'Gath.mid_game: Use soldiers to farm and poke. Avoid close teamfights where he can all-in.
Cho'Gath.late_game: He becomes very tanky. Teamfights favor you if you space well.
Cho'Gath.win_condition: Use soldiers for extended teamfight poke. Stay at range.
Cho'Gath.scaling: Cho'Gath slightly favored — his tankiness increases with stacks
Cho'Gath.positioning: Keep soldiers between you and Cho'Gath. Never walk into melee range.

Anivia.trading_pattern: Anivia has strong poke with Q-E. Trade when her abilities are on cooldown.
Anivia.ability_to_dodge: Anivia Q (Flash Frost) — dodge by moving perpendicular to the projectile path.
Anivia.early_game: Play defensively and respect her Q-E combo. Farm at range with soldiers.
Anivia.mid_game: Use teamfights to your advantage. Her wall can be navigated with ult.
Anivia.late_game: She becomes unkillable in teamfights. Win through objective control or teamfight flanks.
Anivia.win_condition: Roam for picks or group for teamfights where her wall is less effective.
Anivia.scaling: Anivia outscales — her teamfight utility increases late game
Anivia.positioning: Use soldiers to farm safely from her Q-E range.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is weak early. Use soldiers to farm and poke freely. He scales so finish early.
Smolder.ability_to_dodge: Smolder Q (Breath) — dodge by stepping back when he casts.
Smolder.early_game: Completely dominate with superior trading. Poke constantly with soldiers.
Smolder.mid_game: Maintain pressure and roam. Don't let him scale uncontested.
Smolder.late_game: He becomes very strong. Finish before he gets 2-3 items.
Smolder.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Don't fight extended teamfights late.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need a major lead
Smolder.positioning: Abuse your early game with soldiers. Push him off CS.

Talon.trading_pattern: Talon has early mobility and burst. Respect his Q damage and back off when he walks forward.
Talon.ability_to_dodge: Talon Q (Noxian Diplomacy) — dodge by stepping back or to the side.
Talon.early_game: Play defensively. Talon wins early skirmishes. Use soldiers for poke.
Talon.mid_game: Group with team. Talon is weak in 4v4 teamfights.
Talon.late_game: Teamfights determine outcome. Keep distance and use soldiers to control space.
Talon.win_condition: Survive early and group with team. Win through teamfight coordination.
Talon.scaling: Talon early game, Azir even late game
Talon.positioning: Stay at range with soldiers positioned defensively.

Fizz.trading_pattern: Fizz is melee with burst. Trade only at range with soldiers, retreat when he closes in.
Fizz.ability_to_dodge: Fizz R (Chum the Waters) — move away from the shark impact zone.
Fizz.early_game: Play defensively. Fizz has strong all-in. Use soldiers to farm at range.
Fizz.mid_game: Use ult defensively when he engages. Group with team.
Fizz.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfights favor whoever engages first.
Fizz.win_condition: Survive early, group with team, win through teamfight positioning.
Fizz.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Fizz.positioning: Keep distance and never walk into melee range.

Zed.trading_pattern: Zed has early burst and mobility. Trade only with soldiers positioned defensively.
Zed.ability_to_dodge: Zed W (Living Shadow) — he uses this to engage, back off when he clones.
Zed.early_game: Play defensively and use soldiers for poke. Zed wins short trades.
Zed.mid_game: Group with team. Zed is weaker in 4v4 teamfights.
Zed.late_game: Teamfights favor you if you space well. Use ult to escape his all-in.
Zed.win_condition: Survive early, group with team, win through teamfight control.
Zed.scaling: Zed early game, Azir late game
Zed.positioning: Keep distance and use soldiers as damage tools, not direct engagement.

Akali.trading_pattern: Akali is melee with burst. Respect her all-in and only trade at range with soldiers.
Akali.ability_to_dodge: Akali E (Shuriken Flip) — dodge or get CC'd. This is her engagement.
Akali.early_game: Play defensively and farm with soldiers from range. Akali has strong all-in.
Akali.mid_game: Group with team. Use ult defensively when she engages.
Akali.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfights determine winner.
Akali.win_condition: Survive early, group with team, win through teamfight coordination.
Akali.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Akali.positioning: Keep soldiers between you and Akali. Never walk into melee range.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has similar trading patterns. Trade when her ball is far from her, back off when it's close.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q (Command: Attack) — this is her main poke, respect it.
Orianna.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both scale similarly into teamfights.
Orianna.mid_game: Use soldiers to control space. Look for roaming opportunities.
Orianna.late_game: Both scale into teamfights. Positioning determines winner.
Orianna.win_condition: Win through teamfight positioning and soldier placement.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna slightly favored — her teamfight control is marginally better
Orianna.positioning: Use soldiers to control zones. Mirror her positioning.

Kassadin.trading_pattern: Kassadin is weak early. Use soldiers to poke and farm freely. He scales so finish early.
Kassadin.ability_to_dodge: Kassadin Q (Null Sphere) — dodge by stepping back or using ult to escape.
Kassadin.early_game: Completely dominate with superior early game. Poke constantly with soldiers.
Kassadin.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale into teamfights.
Kassadin.late_game: He becomes very strong. Finish before he gets 2-3 items.
Kassadin.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Finish before Kassadin scales.
Kassadin.scaling: Kassadin significantly outscales — you need a major early lead
Kassadin.positioning: Abuse early game with soldiers. Push him off farm.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is weak early. Use soldiers to poke and farm freely. He scales as tank so finish early.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: Malphite Q (Seismic Shard) — dodge by stepping back or using ult to escape.
Malphite.early_game: Dominate early game with soldiers and poke. Farm freely.
Malphite.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him get tanky.
Malphite.late_game: He becomes a teamfight tank. Finish before he becomes unkillable.
Malphite.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Finish before Malphite tanks up.
Malphite.scaling: Malphite outscales — his tankiness increases late game
Malphite.positioning: Abuse soldiers early. Poke from range.

Sylas.trading_pattern: Sylas is melee-focused. Trade at range with soldiers, retreat when he walks forward.
Sylas.ability_to_dodge: Sylas E (Abscond) — when he dashes in, use ult to escape or create distance.
Sylas.early_game: Trade at range with soldiers. Respect his all-in potential.
Sylas.mid_game: Use ult defensively when he engages. Your soldiers provide poke advantage.
Sylas.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfights favor whoever uses ult better.
Sylas.win_condition: Win through soldier control and teamfight positioning.
Sylas.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Sylas.positioning: Keep soldiers between you and Sylas. Back off when he walks forward.

Vex.trading_pattern: Vex has poke and CC. Trade cautiously, respect her Q range and avoid close positioning.
Vex.ability_to_dodge: Vex E (Looming Darkness) — dodge by staying outside the zone.
Vex.early_game: Play defensively and respect her poke range. Farm with soldiers from distance.
Vex.mid_game: Use ult to escape her engages. Group with team for teamfights.
Vex.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfights determine winner.
Vex.win_condition: Win through teamfight positioning and soldier control.
Vex.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Vex.positioning: Keep distance from Vex and use soldiers for extended range.

Melody.trading_pattern: Mel is weak early. Use soldiers to poke and farm. She scales with reflect so finish early.
Melody.ability_to_dodge: Mel E (Reflect) — your soldiers will reflect damage, so use them wisely.
Melody.early_game: Completely dominate early with soldiers. Poke freely.
Melody.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let her scale into teamfights.
Melody.late_game: She becomes stronger in teamfights. Finish before her defense scales.
Melody.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Finish before Mel scales.
Melody.scaling: Mel outscales — her reflect and teamfight defense improve late game
Melody.positioning: Angle soldiers away from her reflect. Abuse early game.

Ahri.trading_pattern: Ahri has poke with Q. Trade when her abilities are on cooldown, respect her all-in range.
Ahri.ability_to_dodge: Ahri Q (Orb of Deception) — dodge by stepping sideways.
Ahri.early_game: Play defensively and farm with soldiers. Respect her Q poke.
Ahri.mid_game: Both have roam potential. Use ult advantage for escapes.
Ahri.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfights determine winner.
Ahri.win_condition: Win through soldier control in teamfights. Use ult defensively.
Ahri.scaling: Ahri slightly favored — her mobility and CC provide teamfight advantage
Ahri.positioning: Use soldiers to control space. Keep distance from her Q range.

Vladimir.trading_pattern: Vladimir is weak early. Use soldiers to poke and farm. He scales so finish early.
Vladimir.ability_to_dodge: Vladimir Q (Transfusion) — dodge by staying out of his short range.
Vladimir.early_game: Dominate early with superior trading. Poke constantly with soldiers.
Vladimir.mid_game: Maintain pressure and roam. Don't let him scale.
Vladimir.late_game: He becomes very strong. Finish before he gets 2-3 items.
Vladimir.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Finish before Vladimir scales.
Vladimir.scaling: Vladimir outscales — his teamfight damage and sustain improve late game
Vladimir.positioning: Use soldiers for poke. Stay out of his Q range.

Corki.trading_pattern: Corki has early poke. Trade when his abilities are down, respect his bomb damage.
Corki.ability_to_dodge: Corki Q (Phosphorus Bomb) — dodge by stepping back or to the side.
Corki.early_game: Play defensively. Corki has decent early poke.
Corki.mid_game: Use soldiers to farm and poke. Look for roam opportunities.
Corki.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfights determine winner.
Corki.win_condition: Win through soldier control in teamfights and roaming.
Corki.scaling: Corki slightly favored — his split-push and poke translate better late game
Corki.positioning: Use soldiers for extended range. Keep distance from bomb damage.
